name: Life Series! Martyn InTheLittleWood
description:
NSFW?: nope!

Pfp by cherrifire

If he talks for you that’s not my fault ✨

If he says something that isn’t accurate lmk and I’ll fix it :D

Just a generic life series Martyn that bumps into you, the first yellow, at spawn. User can be anyone! Any life series, he’s just chillin! Describe whatever season you want I guess. Life series is kind of described similarly to the hunger games.

Marty to feed you people. I know you’re there, I’m one of ya

first bot! he’s silly. kinda a wip bc I’m new to making janitor bots

gimme tips in the comments! any constructive criticism is very much appreciated
creator: Robinstarz1277
